form_id: # FORM REPORTING HIERARCHY - Which Forms Feed Into Which
# Purpose: Shows data flow and relationships between regulatory forms

reporter_threshold: All FDIC-insured banks with foreign offices
purpose: Universal bank-level filing for banks with foreign operations
Universal bank-level filing for domestic-only banks
Simplified filing for smaller banks

form_id: # TIER 2: CONSOLIDATED BHC FORMS (Aggregated from Bank Data)

purpose: Primary BHC regulatory filing consolidating subsidiary banks
Parent company only financial statements (non-consolidated)
Simplified BHC filing for smaller holding companies

form_id: # TIER 3: STRESS TESTING FORMS (Supplements Y-9C Data)

purpose: Comprehensive Capital Analysis annual submission for CCAR
primary_schedules: A.1 Income;A.2 Balance Sheet;A.3 Capital;A.4 RWA

purpose: Quarterly CCAR data including trading and counterparty
Monthly loan-level portfolio data for stress testing
Complex institution liquidity monitoring for LCR/NSFR
Simplified liquidity monitoring
Advanced approaches regulatory capital calculation
Market risk regulatory capital using VaR/sVaR/IRC
G-SIB systemic risk indicator data for Method 1 and 2
Quarterly systemic risk indicators
Country exposure information for foreign claims
Supplement for maturity distribution
Assets and liabilities of large foreign offices

reporter_threshold: All US branches of foreign banks
purpose: Assets and liabilities of US branches/agencies
Basel III Pillar 3 public disclosure requirements
Living will resolution planning information
Structure and operations of FBOs in US
